query: Find all files with extension .py in the current directory and its subdirectories.

execution.verify_cmd: echo 'print(1)' > test.py && mkdir -p sub && echo 'print(2)' > sub/test2.py && find . -name '*.py' | grep -q 'sub/test2.py'

query: Wyciągnij wszystkie unikalne adresy IP z pliku access.log i posortuj je.
Find the PID of the process using port 8080 and kill it.
Create a tar.gz archive of the 'data' folder, but exclude all hidden files like .DS_Store or .git.

execution.verify_cmd: mkdir data && touch data/file.txt data/.hidden && tar --exclude='.*' -czf data.tar.gz data && [ -f data.tar.gz ]

query: Make the script run.sh executable for the owner, but read-only for everyone else.
Search for the string 'TODO' in all files within the 'src' directory recursively, showing line numbers.

execution.verify_cmd: mkdir src && echo 'TODO: fix this' > src/app.py && grep -rn 'TODO' src

query: Pokaż rozmiar wszystkich folderów w bieżącym katalogu, posortowany od największego, w czytelnym formacie.

description: Count lines in specific file types.
query: Count the total number of lines in all .txt files in the current folder.

execution.verify_cmd: echo '1\n2' > a.txt && echo '3' > b.txt && [ $(wc -l *.txt | tail -n 1 | awk '{print $1}') -eq 3 ]

query: Rename all .jpg files in the current directory by adding the prefix 'backup_' to their names.

execution.verify_cmd: touch a.jpg b.jpg && for f in *.jpg; do mv "$f" "backup_$f"; done && [ -f backup_a.jpg ]

query: Display the current system memory usage in megabytes.
